scripts.build: bunite-build && bun run build:ptyd && bunx vite build
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p src/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:direct: bun test test/externalRuntime.test.ts test/localExtensions.test.ts test/paneRegistry.test.ts test/shellModel.test.ts test/terminalPath.test.ts test/workspaceBus.test.ts test/ptydBackend.test.ts
